Hexagrams

I Ching hexagram lookup for beginners.

Use this lookup to connect a reading result with a plain-English theme. The table starts with important beginner patterns and keeps the URL ready for a full 64-hexagram expansion.

No.NamePlain-English reading
1Qian / CreativeInitiative, strength, direction, and responsible action.
2Kun / ReceptiveSupport, patience, grounding, and practical response.
24Fu / ReturnComing back to the right rhythm after a pause or error.
29Kan / WaterRisk, depth, repeated challenge, and careful movement.
52Gen / MountainStillness, boundaries, and knowing when not to move.
64Wei Ji / Before CompletionTransition, unfinished work, and the need for careful timing.
I Ching Reading Guide

A calm I Ching tool for hexagrams, changing lines, and reflective decisions.
